/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -current_version 0.9.8 -o libggml.0.9.8.dylib -install_name @rpath/libggml.0.dylib CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/ggml_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/ggml-backend-dl.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/ggml-backend-reg.cpp.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/zhaopeng.charles/code/magechiu/aiplayer/build/_deps/whispercpp-build/ggml/src -Wl,-rpath,/Users/zhaopeng.charles/code/magechiu/aiplayer/build/_deps/whispercpp-build/ggml/src/ggml-blas -Wl,-rpath,/Users/zhaopeng.charles/code/magechiu/aiplayer/build/_deps/whispercpp-build/ggml/src/ggml-metal libggml-cpu.0.9.8.dylib ggml-blas/libggml-blas.0.9.8.dylib ggml-metal/libggml-metal.0.9.8.dylib libggml-base.0.9.8.dylib
